title: Recipe 2 for Avibacterium paragallinarum Strains from Yangzhou
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"4jf4p","text":"This recipe was generated by our Deep16SCulture AI framework for Avibacterium paragallinarum Strains from Yangzhou University.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"italic","offset":65,"length":28}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
materials_text: {"blocks":[{"key":"cbr7k","text":"Original:","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"pdbyb","text":"- Agar: 15,000 mg","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"axh7n","text":"- Trypticase soy broth: 30,000 mg","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"be3yu","text":"- Yeast extract: 3,000 mg","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"v1mmu","text":"- Water: 1,000 ml","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"foman","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"dlsi6","text":"Improvements:","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"7ciqf","text":"- Added: 100 ml horse blood (V factor).","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":2,"length":5}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"n3pd1","text":"- Optional: Yeast extract (if blood is fresh).","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"italic","offset":2,"length":8}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"gtiq9","text":"- Notes: Supplement with 0.1% NAD if blood is heat-treated.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"italic","offset":2,"length":5}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Add 15,000 mg of agar to the mixture.
Add 30,000 mg of trypticase soy broth.
Add 100 ml of horse blood (V factor).
Optionally, add yeast extract if the blood is fresh.
Supplement with 0.1% NAD if the blood is heat-treated.
creator: wujunfeng
